repo_url.description: Target Git repository URL. Leave empty when repo_path already points to a local checkout.

repo_branch.description: Optional branch, tag, or commit to checkout after cloning/updating.

repo_path.description: Local repository checkout path. Relative paths are resolved under AstrBot data/plugin_data/astrbot_plugin_project_helper/repos.

enabled_sessions.description: Only handle these unified session IDs. Empty means all sessions.

buffer_seconds.description: Seconds to wait for consecutive user messages before asking the agent.

max_buffer_messages.description: Maximum number of messages kept for one pending question.

max_answer_chars.description: Maximum characters sent to the group in one answer.

agent_model.description: Reserved for future use. The plugin currently uses AstrBot's selected provider/model for the session.

agent_timeout_seconds.description: Maximum seconds to wait for one agent run.

tool_timeout_seconds.description: Maximum seconds for each repository tool call.

max_tool_calls.description: Maximum repository tool calls per agent run.

conversation_ttl_seconds.description: Keep recent message context for this many seconds.

respond_when_mentioned_only.description: If true, only process messages that wake or mention the bot.

send_typing.description: Send typing indicator while the agent is working when the platform supports it.

auto_update_repo.description: Run git fetch/pull before answering. Disable this for very large repositories or offline deployments.

include_sources.description: Ask the agent to include concise file references in answers.

debug_reply_on_error.description: Reply with a short error message when the agent fails. If false, failures are only logged.
